mapper.select: SELECT l.*, COALESCE(SUM(i.gross_pay), 0) AS total_gross, COALESCE(SUM(i.total_deduction), 0) AS total_deduction, COALESCE(SUM(i.net_pay), 0) AS total_net, COUNT(i.id)::int AS employee_count FROM erp_payroll_ledgers l LEFT JOIN erp_payroll_items i ON l.id = i.ledger_id WHERE l.id = #{id}::uuid GROUP BY l.id
mapper.update: UPDATE erp_payroll_ledgers SET title = #{title}, pay_date = #{payDate}::date, pay_type = #{payType}, start_date = #{startDate}::date, end_date = #{endDate}::date, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}::uuid
UPDATE erp_payroll_ledgers SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}::uuid
mapper.select: SELECT code, label AS name, CASE WHEN code_group = 'PAY_ALLOWANCE' THEN 'allowance' ELSE 'deduction' END AS type, CASE WHEN code IN ('MEAL', 'CAR', 'PENSION', 'HEALTH', 'LTC', 'EMP', 'INCOME_TAX', 'LOCAL_TAX') THEN false ELSE true END AS is_taxable, CASE WHEN code = 'MEAL' THEN 200000.00 WHEN code = 'CAR' THEN 200000.00 ELSE 0.00 END AS tax_free_limit, CASE WHEN code IN ('BASE', 'MEAL', 'CAR', 'PENSION', 'HEALTH', 'LTC', 'EMP', 'INCOME_TAX', 'LOCAL_TAX') THEN true ELSE false END AS is_system, is_active, sort_order FROM erp_codes WHERE code_group IN ('PAY_ALLOWANCE', 'PAY_DEDUCTION') ORDER BY code_group ASC, sort_order ASC

SELECT code, label AS name, CASE WHEN code_group = 'PAY_ALLOWANCE' THEN 'allowance' ELSE 'deduction' END AS type, CASE WHEN code IN ('MEAL', 'CAR', 'PENSION', 'HEALTH', 'LTC', 'EMP', 'INCOME_TAX', 'LOCAL_TAX') THEN false ELSE true END AS is_taxable, CASE WHEN code = 'MEAL' THEN 200000.00 WHEN code = 'CAR' THEN 200000.00 ELSE 0.00 END AS tax_free_limit, CASE WHEN code IN ('BASE', 'MEAL', 'CAR', 'PENSION', 'HEALTH', 'LTC', 'EMP', 'INCOME_TAX', 'LOCAL_TAX') THEN true ELSE false END AS is_system, is_active, sort_order FROM erp_codes WHERE code = #{code} AND code_group IN ('PAY_ALLOWANCE', 'PAY_DEDUCTION') LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO erp_codes ( id, code_group, code_group_name, code, label, sort_order, is_active, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( uuid_generate_v4(), CASE WHEN #{type} = 'allowance' THEN 'PAY_ALLOWANCE' ELSE 'PAY_DEDUCTION' END, CASE WHEN #{type} = 'allowance' THEN '지급항목' ELSE '공제항목' END, #{code}, #{name}, #{sortOrder}, #{isActive}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE erp_codes SET label = #{name}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE code = #{code} AND code_group IN ('PAY_ALLOWANCE', 'PAY_DEDUCTION')
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM erp_codes WHERE code = #{code} AND code_group IN ('PAY_ALLOWANCE', 'PAY_DEDUCTION')
mapper.select: SELECT t.*, u.full_name AS employee_name, e.employee_no, d.name AS department_name FROM erp_salary_templates t JOIN erp_employees e ON t.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN users u ON e.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN erp_departments d ON e.department_id = d.id WHERE e.status = 'active' ORDER BY e.employee_no ASC

SELECT t.*, u.full_name AS employee_name, e.employee_no, d.name AS department_name FROM erp_salary_templates t JOIN erp_employees e ON t.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN users u ON e.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN erp_departments d ON e.department_id = d.id WHERE t.employee_id = #{employeeId}::uuid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO erp_salary_templates ( employee_id, base_pay, position_pay, meal_allowance, car_allowance, use_national_pension, use_health_insurance, use_employment_insurance, income_tax_rate, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{employeeId}::uuid, #{basePay}, #{positionPay}, #{mealAllowance}, #{carAllowance}, #{useNationalPension}, #{useHealthInsurance}, #{useEmploymentInsurance}, #{incomeTaxRate}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE erp_salary_templates SET base_pay = #{basePay}, position_pay = #{positionPay}, meal_allowance = #{mealAllowance}, car_allowance = #{carAllowance}, use_national_pension = #{useNationalPension}, use_health_insurance = #{useHealthInsurance}, use_employment_insurance = #{useEmploymentInsurance}, income_tax_rate = #{incomeTaxRate}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId}::uuid
mapper.select: SELECT i.*, u.full_name AS employee_name, e.employee_no, d.name AS department_name, e.position, det.id AS detail_id, det.payroll_item_id AS detail_payroll_item_id, det.code AS detail_code, c.name AS detail_name, c.type AS detail_type, det.amount AS detail_amount, det.is_taxable AS detail_is_taxable FROM erp_payroll_items i JOIN erp_employees e ON i.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN users u ON e.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN erp_departments d ON e.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN erp_payroll_details det ON i.id = det.payroll_item_id LEFT JOIN erp_payroll_codes c ON det.code = c.code WHERE i.ledger_id = #{ledgerId}::uuid ORDER BY e.employee_no ASC, c.sort_order ASC

SELECT i.*, u.full_name AS employee_name, e.employee_no, d.name AS department_name, e.position, det.id AS detail_id, det.payroll_item_id AS detail_payroll_item_id, det.code AS detail_code, c.name AS detail_name, c.type AS detail_type, det.amount AS detail_amount, det.is_taxable AS detail_is_taxable FROM erp_payroll_items i JOIN erp_employees e ON i.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN users u ON e.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN erp_departments d ON e.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN erp_payroll_details det ON i.id = det.payroll_item_id LEFT JOIN erp_payroll_codes c ON det.code = c.code WHERE i.id = #{id}::uuid ORDER BY c.sort_order ASC

SELECT i.*, u.full_name AS employee_name, e.employee_no, d.name AS department_name, e.position, det.id AS detail_id, det.payroll_item_id AS detail_payroll_item_id, det.code AS detail_code, c.name AS detail_name, c.type AS detail_type, det.amount AS detail_amount, det.is_taxable AS detail_is_taxable FROM erp_payroll_items i JOIN erp_employees e ON i.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN users u ON e.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN erp_departments d ON e.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN erp_payroll_details det ON i.id = det.payroll_item_id LEFT JOIN erp_payroll_codes c ON det.code = c.code WHERE i.ledger_id = #{ledgerId}::uuid AND i.employee_id = #{employeeId}::uuid ORDER BY c.sort_order ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE erp_payroll_items SET gross_pay = #{grossPay}, total_deduction = #{totalDeduction}, net_pay = #{netPay}, bank_name = #{bankName}, bank_account = #{bankAccount}, bank_owner = #{bankOwner}, status = #{status}, memo = #{memo}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}::uuid
mapper.select: SELECT d.*, c.name, c.type FROM erp_payroll_details d JOIN erp_payroll_codes c ON d.code = c.code WHERE d.payroll_item_id = #{payrollItemId}::uuid ORDER BY c.sort_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO erp_payroll_details ( id, payroll_item_id, code, amount, is_taxable, created_at ) VALUES ( #{id}::uuid, #{payrollItemId}::uuid, #{code}, #{amount}, #{isTaxable}, NOW() ) ON CONFLICT (payroll_item_id, code) DO UPDATE SET amount = EXCLUDED.amount, is_taxable = EXCLUDED.is_taxable

INSERT INTO erp_payroll_details (id, payroll_item_id, code, amount, is_taxable, created_at) VALUES
(#{det.id}::uuid, #{det.payrollItemId}::uuid, #{det.code}, #{det.amount}, #{det.isTaxable}, NOW())
ON CONFLICT (payroll_item_id, code) DO UPDATE SET amount = EXCLUDED.amount, is_taxable = EXCLUDED.is_taxable
mapper.sql: p.id, p.employee_id, u.full_name AS employee_name, e.employee_no, d.name AS department_name, p.pay_year, p.pay_month, p.pay_date, p.base_pay, p.position_pay, p.overtime_pay, p.bonus_pay, p.meal_allowance, p.transportation, p.income_tax, p.local_tax, p.national_pension, p.health_insurance, p.employment_insurance, p.longterm_care, p.gross_pay, p.total_deduction, p.net_pay, p.status, p.confirmed_by, p.confirmed_at, p.memo, p.created_by, p.created_at, p.updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM erp_payrolls p LEFT JOIN erp_employees e ON p.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN users u ON e.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN erp_departments d ON e.department_id = d.id WHERE p.employee_id = #{employeeId}::uuid ORDER BY p.pay_year DESC, p.pay_month DESC
SELECT FROM erp_payrolls p LEFT JOIN erp_employees e ON p.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN users u ON e.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN erp_departments d ON e.department_id = d.id WHERE p.id = #{id}::uuid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO erp_payrolls ( id, employee_id, pay_year, pay_month, pay_date, base_pay, position_pay, overtime_pay, bonus_pay, meal_allowance, transportation, income_tax, local_tax, national_pension, health_insurance, employment_insurance, longterm_care, gross_pay, total_deduction, net_pay, status, memo, created_by, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}::uuid, #{employeeId}::uuid, #{payYear}, #{payMonth}, #{payDate}::date, #{basePay}, #{positionPay}, #{overtimePay}, #{bonusPay}, #{mealAllowance}, #{transportation}, #{incomeTax}, #{localTax}, #{nationalPension}, #{healthInsurance}, #{employmentInsurance}, #{longtermCare}, #{grossPay}, #{totalDeduction}, #{netPay}, #{status}, #{memo}, #{createdBy}::uuid, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE erp_payrolls SET base_pay = #{basePay}, position_pay = #{positionPay}, overtime_pay = #{overtimePay}, bonus_pay = #{bonusPay}, meal_allowance = #{mealAllowance}, transportation = #{transportation}, income_tax = #{incomeTax}, local_tax = #{localTax}, national_pension = #{nationalPension}, health_insurance = #{healthInsurance}, employment_insurance = #{employmentInsurance}, longterm_care = #{longtermCare}, gross_pay = #{grossPay}, total_deduction = #{totalDeduction}, net_pay = #{netPay}, memo = #{memo}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}::uuid

UPDATE erp_payrolls SET status = #{status}, confirmed_by = #{confirmedBy}::uuid, confirmed_at = CASE WHEN #{status} IN ('confirmed','paid') THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}::uuid
